content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 4, 0), (7, 8, 0), (2, 8, 1), (3, 9, 1), (3, 7, 4), (4, 6, 8), (0, 3, 10), (3, 6, 10), (1, 6, 13), (4, 5, 13), (0, 7, 14), (2, 6, 14), (5, 6, 14), (0, 4, 17)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 13.

First, we will scan each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (2, 4, 0) has no matching node and time.
* Edge (7, 8, 0) has no matching node and time.
* Edge (2, 8, 1) has node 2 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 9, 1) has node 3 and time 1. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 7, 4) has node 3 and time 4. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (4, 6, 8) has node 4 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 3, 10) has node 0 and time 10. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (3, 6, 10) has node 3 and time 10. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 6, 13) has node 1 and time 13. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (4, 5, 13) has node 4 and time 13. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 7, 14) has node 0 and time 14. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 6, 14) has node 2 and time 14. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 6, 14) has node 5 and time 14. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 4, 17) has node 0 and time 17. -> Add node 4.

Now we have collected all the nodes that are linked with node 5 at time 13:
[6, 5, 4, 3, 2]

Answer: [6, 5, 4, 3, 2]
